subcodes.title: Prayer in reply to Mulla 'Abd al-Jalil, on the thanksgiving prostration
subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God Who hath revealed His Own Self through His Own Self, Who hath exalted Himself above all likeness to His servants, and Who hath sanctified Himself beyond all comparison with His signs [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: بسم الله الرحمن الرحیم. الحمد لله الذی قد عرف نفسه بنفسه و تنزه عن مجانسة عباده و تقدس عن مقارنة اثاره
subcodes.subjects: @station of the Manifestation of God, @self-description of God; God's self-remembrance, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @chastisement and requital
